# Edu Smart Pro
> The ultimate AI-powered app to automate attendance, fees, and student management for coaching centers.

## Core Features
- [Dashboard](/dashboard/): Smart dashboards for Admins and Students.
- [Attendance Tracking](/dashboard/attendance/): Automated attendance logging.
- [Fee Management](/dashboard/fees/): Track payments and dues instantly.
- [Homework AI](/dashboard/homework/): AI-driven homework assistance.

## Legal & Info
- [Privacy Policy](/legal/privacy/): How we protect your data.
- [Terms of Service](/legal/term/): Rules of the platform.
